title: Trace execution through all 6 Phased Cycles
description: Trace the execution flow through all six phases of the Node.js Event Loop. Predict the exact execution order of asynchronous operations within the Event Loop. Implement strategies to prevent I/O starvation and ensure fair resource allocation in Event Loop cycles.
objectives: Trace the execution flow through all six phases of the Node.js Event Loop.
Predict the exact execution order of asynchronous operations within the Event Loop.
Implement strategies to prevent I/O starvation and ensure fair resource allocation in Event Loop cycles.
